overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character crosses a street and navigates sidewalks lined with holographic advertisements, eventually ascending a stairway into a covered walkway.

towering glass and steel buildings covered in holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. Neon holographic billboards illuminate the towering skyscrapers ahead while steam rises from street vents. The camera moves steadily forward, passing opposing pedestrians, and steps onto the sidewalk at the end of the segment.

events.description: enters covered sidewalk area with black metal fence on the right and overpass overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along a fenced sidewalk under an overpass, following a large man in a white tank top

notable_agents.action: large man in white tank top and yellow pants walking steadily ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows overhead
short black and yellow posts separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow sidewalk sheltered beneath a massive concrete overpass. A black metal fence runs along the right side while traffic passes on the left. The camera follows a large man in a white tank top walking ahead, with the futuristic skyline visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and planters

events.description: exits the covered overpass area, fence ends, and sidewalk widens with large concrete planters

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts including a burger joint and data inc building

entered.detail: illuminated orange neon sign for a burger restaurant
large teal neon sign reading DATA INC on building facade
large circular concrete planters with small trees lining the sidewalk
red and white striped construction barriers blocking part of the walkway
green and orange neon sign for a pawn shop

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk opens up as the camera leaves the overpass area, revealing a wider commercial street lined with neon storefronts. The camera passes a burger joint with an orange sign and a DATA INC building with teal neon lettering. Large concrete planters and construction barriers line the path as the camera approaches a stairway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway entrance with outdoor seating

begins ascending the stairs into the covered walkway with red interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs into a covered walkway, following a person in a green jacket

enclosed pedestrian bridge or walkway with roof structure

tables and chairs with large umbrellas outside a cafe

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and begins ascending a concrete stairway leading into a covered walkway. The area features outdoor cafe seating with umbrellas on the right and a pawn shop sign visible before the turn. As the camera climbs the stairs, the scene transitions into a corridor illuminated by intense red neon lights, with a pedestrian in a green jacket walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit city intersection into a narrow, red-hued elevated corridor. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards, moving steadily forward through rising steam until it reaches the sidewalk. The camera then transitions beneath a massive concrete overpass, following a man in a white tank top along a fenced path with the futuristic skyline visible to the left. As the camera leaves the shelter of the overpass, the environment opens into a commercial street lined with teal and orange neon storefronts and construction barriers before approaching a stairway. Finally, the camera ascends the concrete steps past outdoor cafe seating and a pawn shop, entering a covered walkway bathed in intense red neon light.
